jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at MagicBricks
jsonLd.description:
MagicBricks invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
